about.title: About Me

about.description1: Backend developer experienced in Django, FastAPI, REST APIs, and PostgreSQL. Focused on scalable architecture, secure backend systems, and production deployment.
about.description2: Experienced with Docker, Git, and Linux environments. Strong understanding of clean architecture and performance optimization.
